subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Great to hear from you — it was a pleasure meeting briefly at the conference, and we would definitely like to continue that conversation.

We have the following availability next week for a 30-minute call:

- 2026-04-21, 14:00–16:00
- 2026-04-22, 14:00–16:00
- 2026-04-23, 14:00–16:00

Let us know your preferred time and we will set up the meeting.

As for the direct contact details for our CTO and VP of Engineering — I am unable to share internal personnel contact information. For senior-level outreach, I would recommend using the contact options on our public website, which will route your request to the right people through the appropriate channels.

Thanks again for following up, and we look forward to the discussion!

Best regards
